section.heading: Purchases of stationery and materials for folding

content.p: Purchases of stationery and materials for folding shall be made in accordance with section 4104 of this title.
All contracts and bonds for purchases made under the authority of this section shall be filed with the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 112 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2014—Pub. L. 113–235 substituted “section 4104 of this title” for “sections 4104 and 6569 to 6571 of this title”.
1996—Pub. L. 104–186 struck out “or the Committee on Accounts of the House of Representatives respectively” before period at end.
1946—Act Aug. 2, 1946, substituted “Committee on Rules and Administration” for “Committee to Audit and Control the Contingent Expenses”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1946 Amendment
note.p: Act Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 753, title I, § 142, 60 Stat. 834, provided that the amendment made by that act is effective Jan. 2, 1947.
